name: Stash Reminder — Alert When Content Running Low

nodes.name: Check Stash 9AM & 6PM
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: n8n (NERVOUS SYSTEM)
Check content runway twice daily

nodes.name: Get Stash Runway
nodes.notes: Query the stash_runway view for days remaining per platform

parameters.query: SELECT stash_warning_days, stash_critical_days, reminder_channel FROM campaigns WHERE is_active = true LIMIT 1

nodes.name: Below Warning Threshold?
nodes.notes: Only alert if any platform is below warning days

parameters.name: message
parameters.value:
=Generate a brief, friendly WhatsApp/Telegram reminder that the content stash is running low.

Runway data:
{{ JSON.stringify($node['Get Stash Runway'].json) }}

Keep it short (2-3 lines max), conversational, include the most urgent platform.
Example: 'Hey! Your Instagram stash runs out tomorrow (0.7 days left). TikTok has 1.3 days. Upload some new media or approve more from the stash!'

Return plain text only, no JSON.

nodes.name: OpenClaw: Generate & Send Reminder
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: OpenClaw (BRAIN) generates the message
n8n delivers it via the channel (WhatsApp/Telegram)
